name: Add a related part entry linking two parts
steps:
Given the 'Related Parts' feature is enabled in global part settings
Given parts 'Resistor 10k' and 'Resistor 10k 1%' exist in the system with no existing relationship
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
When the user clicks the 'Add Related Part' button in the Related Parts table
When the user selects 'Resistor 10k 1%' in the related part search field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Related Parts table on 'Resistor 10k' displays 'Resistor 10k 1%'

name: Related Parts table is hidden when the Related Parts feature is disabled
steps:
Given the 'Related Parts' feature is disabled in global part settings
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to any part detail page
Then the 'Related Parts' table is not visible on the part detail page

name: Related Parts table is visible when the Related Parts feature is enabled
steps:
Given the 'Related Parts' feature is enabled in global part settings
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' has one related part 'Resistor 10k 1%'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
Then the 'Related Parts' table is visible and displays 'Resistor 10k 1%'
